svg.style: background: #F5F3EC; background-color: light-dark(#F5F3EC, #1e1c16); color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="app.diagrams.net" agent="Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/146.0.0.0 Safari/537.36" version="29.6.4"> <diagram id="diagram_1" name="Architecture"> <mxGraphModel dx="1426" dy="749" grid="1" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="827" pageHeight="1169" background="#F5F3EC" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="ui_layer" parent="1" style="swimlane;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fontColor=#000000;" value="<font style="color: light-dark(rgb(255, 255, 255), rgb(255, 255, 255));">UI Layer (Jetpack Compose)</font>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="200" width="300" x="60" y="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="screens" parent="ui_layer" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fontColor=#000000;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;" value="Screens
(Dashboard, Settings, etc.)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="160" x="20" y="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="viewmodels" parent="ui_layer" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fontColor=#000000;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;" value="ViewModels
(Auth, Health)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="120" x="120" y="120" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="edge_ui" edge="1" parent="ui_layer" source="screens" target="viewmodels"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="data_layer" parent="1" style="swimlane;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fontColor=#000000;" value="<font style="color: light-dark(rgb(255, 255, 255), rgb(255, 255, 255));">Data Layer (Repository)</font>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="300" width="320" x="420" y="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="repository" parent="data_layer" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fontColor=#000000;fillColor=#ffe6cc;strokeColor=#d79b00;" value="HealthRepository" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="120" x="100" y="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="local_db" parent="data_layer" style="shape=cylinder3;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;boundedLbl=1;backgroundOutline=1;size=15;fontColor=#000000;fillColor=#f8cecc;strokeColor=#b85450;" value="Local DB
(Room / SQLite)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="100" x="20" y="160" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="remote_db" parent="data_layer" style="cloud;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fontColor=#000000;fillColor=#e1d5e7;strokeColor=#9673a6;" value="Remote API
(Supabase)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="120" x="180" y="160" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="edge_repo_local" edge="1" parent="data_layer" source="repository" target="local_db"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="edge_repo_remote" edge="1" parent="data_layer" source="repository" target="remote_db"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="edge_vm_repo" edge="1" parent="1" source="viewmodels" target="repository"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="di_layer" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;dashed=1;fillColor=#f5f5f5;fontColor=#000000;strokeColor=#666666;" value="DI Layer (Hilt)
AppModule" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="300" x="60" y="300" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="main_activity" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fontColor=#000000;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;" value="MainActivity (Entry Point)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="300" x="60" y="400" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="edge_main_ui" edge="1" parent="1" source="main_activity" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;dashed=1;fontColor=#000000;" target="ui_layer" value="<b><font style="color: light-dark(rgb(255, 255, 255), rgb(255, 255, 255));">Hosts UI</font></b>"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="30" y="430" /> <mxPoint x="30" y="140" /> </Array> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="edge_di_main" edge="1" parent="1" source="di_layer" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;dashed=1;fontColor=#000000;" target="main_activity" value="<b><font style="color: light-dark(rgb(255, 255, 255), rgb(255, 255, 255));">Injects</font></b>"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="edge_di_repo" edge="1" parent="1" source="di_layer" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;dashed=1;fontColor=#000000;" target="data_layer" value="<font style="color: light-dark(rgb(255, 255, 255), rgb(255, 255, 255));">Provides</font>"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
